summary: Excellent implementation with one critical issue: Run-ActTests.ps1 line ~75 copies .actrc unconditionally without checking existence, while all other required files are validated in phase 1. Should be added to phase 1 checks or conditioned with -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue. Otherwise, production-quality: solid PowerShell practices (Set-StrictMode, proper error handling), clean workflow with correct triggers/permissions/job dependencies, modular library design, comprehensive act-based testing.
